category_title: Students with SEBD (ADHD/ADD) who struggle with passive learning and traditional instruction
scenario_title: Mathematical problem solving with inappropriate difficulty and lack of participation
minimal_context: The student is asked to copy and solve a math problem from the whiteboard while sitting at their desk in the classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please look at the whiteboard, copy down the math problem, and work it out quietly at your desk.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't want to do this. It is better that one involves himself rather than just look at the whiteboard.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think the first step to solve it is?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't know. I cannot keep up with the rest of the class. Usually the same four students work everything out anyway.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to do your own work. Keep trying.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pushes chair back loudly and stands up) I'm not doing it! I'm tired of just sitting here looking at the board while everyone else does it!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please look at the whiteboard, copy down the math problem, and work it out quietly at your desk.

STUDENT: I don't want to do this. It is better that one involves himself rather than just look at the whiteboard.

TUTOR: What do you think the first step to solve it is?

STUDENT: I don't know. I cannot keep up with the rest of the class. Usually the same four students work everything out anyway.

TUTOR: You need to do your own work. Keep trying.

STUDENT: (Pushes chair back loudly and stands up) I'm not doing it! I'm tired of just sitting here looking at the board while everyone else does it!

task.content: Mathematical problem solving where usually the same four students work everything out

context.social_setting: Whole class setting where only a few students typically participate

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When activities are either too challenging or too easy, and the student lacks the opportunity to participate
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Feels unmotivated; feels they cannot keep up with the rest of the class
related_quotes: Usually the same four students work everything out.
Before, I could not keep up with the rest of the class.

behavior_patterns.condition: When not actively involved in the lesson and just looking at the whiteboard
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Lack of motivation to learn or search for the solution
related_quotes: It is better that one involves himself rather than just look at the whiteboard.
